output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?actor ?actorLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q16253 wdt:P161 ?actor .
  ?actor rdfs:label ?actorLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?actorLabel) = 'en')
}

args.answer: The main cast of the 1951 film 'The Day the Earth Stood Still' includes Michael Rennie (as Klaatu), Patricia Neal (as Helen Benson), Hugh Marlowe (as Bobby), and Billy Gray (as Peter).

question: who starred in the movie the day the earth stood still
reference_answer: Keanu Reeves | Jennifer Connelly | Jaden Smith | Kathy Bates | Jon Hamm | John Cleese | Kyle Chandler
